inProgress.changeEvidencePlanEmptyA11y: Set an evidence plan for this step
inProgress.addMoreEvidenceA11y: Add more evidence to this step
inProgress.pauseA11y: Set this step aside — pause it

paused.body: Set aside — still here, nothing lost. Your next step routes past it until you pick it back up.
paused.pickUpA11y: Pick this step back up and continue

completed.reopenA11y: Reopen this step to add more evidence or continue work

allComplete.heading: Every step done.
allComplete.body: Now design the badge that marks it — the keepsake comes at the end.
allComplete.designBadgeA11y: Design your badge to celebrate completing this goal

progressStrip.a11yLabel: {{done}} of {{total}} steps done. See all steps.

parked.heading: Nothing in progress.
parked.body: {{count}} set aside — all still here, none hidden, nothing counted. Pick one back up when you're ready.

a11y.allStepsComplete: All steps complete for "{{title}}". Mark Complete is now available on the goal card.

toast.evidenceRequired: Add evidence before completing this step

errors.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
